TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rahu’, title = Rahu’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rahu’} }

S.FORM: alang Rahu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 84 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 281 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rahu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Rahu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Rahu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rahu' hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'llaw na Rahu' hya' ga Qus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Rahu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 84 buwan, 294 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 281 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rahu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Rahu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Rahu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rahu' hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'llaw na Rahu' hya' ga Qus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raħuʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa,, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na raħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-s~ɕinqumi. taj ʔllaw na raħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa qus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
